articles.title: Dangerous heat index levels in 28 areas, Pagasa warns
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines – Twenty-eight areas in the country will experience sweltering temperatures due to a danger-level heat index, the weather bureau said Saturday. Heat index is what the temperature feels like to the human body when relative humidity combines with air. READ: Heat Index: Why Cebuanos should not take the heat for granted A peak heat index of 44°C is forecast in Laoag, Ilocos Norte; Camiling, Tarlac; Sangley Point, Cavite City, Cavite; Cuyo, Palawan; Roxas City, Capiz; and Dumangas, Iloilo, according to the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA).
